description_long: This playground structure features a compact multi-play design set on a large grassy area. The main structure consists of a raised wooden platform with vertical slats, accessible by a small set of stairs and protected by a red gabled roof. Attached to one side is a bright red slide, providing a fun descent from the platform. The structure is supported by sturdy wooden posts and includes safety barriers around the elevated platform to prevent falls. The overall design is simple and functional, with natural wood tones complemented by the vivid red of the roof and slide. The surrounding area is open, offering ample space for children to play safely around the equipment.
description: A compact wooden multi-play structure with a red roof and slide, set on a large grassy area. Features include a raised platform, stairs, and safety barriers.
description_view_0: The structure is seen from a distance on the right side, showing the red slide, stairs, and the red-roofed platform on a large grassy field.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the structure, with the red roof and slide visible, and the stairs partially obscured.
description_view_2: Front view showing the stairs leading up to the platform, the red slide on the left, and the safety barriers around the platform.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the platform and the red roof, with the slide and stairs mostly hidden.
